title: Alternative battery technology
desc: High-performance zinc-based (Zn-air, Zn-ion) batteries addressing corrosion, dendrite formation and efficiency for next-generation energy storage.

title: Distributed energy resource management for RE & EVs
desc: Real-time monitoring and forecasting for rooftop solar and EV charging integration to enhance grid stability and optimise tariffs.

title: Global AI-enabled platform for contract prototype manufacturing
desc: A global portal connecting users with reliable, affordable manufacturers for high-quality prototype creation.

title: All-weather portable refrigeration systems
desc: Compact, compressor-free, renewable-powered coolers protecting food, vaccines and pharma in energy-scarce areas.

title: Hand-held heavy-metal-ion sensor for water testing (U-FOS)
desc: Low-cost U-bent fibre-optic sensing for rapid, ultrasensitive on-site detection of heavy metals in water.

title: Energy-efficient electric vending vehicles
desc: Mobile vending vehicle with temperature control, weather protection and optimised display for fruit and vegetable vendors.

title: Data-driven C&D waste management for cities
desc: Computer-vision and GIS-based tracking to detect, quantify and optimise construction & demolition waste collection.

title: Integrated decarbonisation solutions for Indian steel
desc: Phased decarbonisation roadmaps, technology pilots and capacity building for steel producers aligned with net-zero goals.

title: Blood-based biomarker measurement
desc: Scalable microfluidic diagnostics for rapid, low-cost isolation and quantification of cells and biomarkers; first application in dairy health.

title: Wearable neuromodulation device for migraine relief
desc: Affordable, technology-enabled diagnosis, monitoring and management of migraine for ~200 million Indians.

title: Resource recovery from plastic waste
desc: Decentralised, mobile, solar-powered platforms converting polyolefin packaging waste into value-added products.

title: Laser-processed medical materials and devices
desc: Femtosecond laser-structured surgical meshes with tunable surface properties for enhanced biocompatibility.

title: Digital twins for molten salt reactors
desc: High-fidelity digital twin of a 5 MW thorium molten salt reactor for safety assurance and operational optimisation.

title: Customisable silicone wearables in healthcare
desc: Multi-material 3D printing of high-viscosity silicones for patient-specific prosthetics and care devices.

title: AI-based ERP for the NDT business
desc: Intelligent platform for manpower planning, workflow optimisation and reporting in non-destructive testing.

title: Smart robotic system for pavement evaluation
desc: Automated robotic surface-wave testing to estimate layer properties of bituminous pavements.

title: ML-based lubricant condition monitoring for EVs
desc: Multi-parameter lubricant monitoring with AI-driven analytics for real-time health assessment and predictive maintenance.

title: 2D-material devices for next-gen communication
desc: Advanced 2D materials enabling high-performance mmWave and terahertz devices for 5G/6G, satellite and IoT.

title: Field-assisted ultrafast manufacturing (flash sintering)
desc: Rapid, energy-efficient densification of advanced ceramics, scaled from lab prototype to industry-ready platform.

title: Li-ion cathode active material manufacturing
desc: Novel scalable rapid synthesis of LFP, NMC and Ni-rich cathode materials for cost-effective large-scale production.

title: HumanVoice: adaptive voice AI for child learning
desc: Emotionally adaptive, curriculum-aligned voice companion delivering personalised learning for children aged 3–12.

title: Carbon credit trading system
desc: Financial and market architecture for voluntary carbon trading with transparent credit ownership and exchange.

title: Electrically-driven single-photon emitters
desc: On-demand single-photon sources for scalable quantum communication and secure quantum key distribution.

title: Scalable innovation in cancer drug development
desc: GMP-ready manufacturing platforms and smart quality systems for reliable, affordable cancer therapeutics.

title: Digital twins for autonomous factories
desc: Integrating 3D printers, CNC machines, robotic arms and AMRs with real-time data for adaptive smart manufacturing.

title: Digital-twin kidney disease diagnostics
desc: Wearable ultrasound patch and predictive diagnostics for continuous, personalised kidney health monitoring.

title: Battery thermal management for second-life packs
desc: Optimised BTMS for second-life Li-ion packs in solar-powered rural EV charging stations.

title: Ball tracking for sports analytics
desc: An umpire decision-review system with human-umpire fidelity and minimised error, built on ball and spin tracking.

title: Drone-based air quality monitoring
desc: Drone-mounted Kaatru devices for 3-D spatio-temporal characterisation of air pollution.
